sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73322" key="o)lofurte/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλοφυρ-τέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be lamented,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμέρα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0638.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
